title: Ukrainian engineers, inventors, researchers and scientists are today...
title_en: Ukrainian engineers, inventors, researchers and scientists are today...
title_uk: Українські інженери, винахідники, дослідники та вчені сьогодні...
description: Ukrainian engineers, inventors, researchers and scientists are today the driver of our technological power. It is thanks to your intelligence and daily work that Ukraine finds effective answers to the most difficult challenges. In times of war, technological development, creativity and scientific knowledge become a special advantage. From marine drones, NRC and drones to complex artificial intelligence systems - your developments...
description_en: Ukrainian engineers, inventors, researchers and scientists are today the driver of our technological power. It is thanks to your intelligence and daily work that Ukraine finds effective answers to the most difficult challenges. In times of war, technological development, creativity and scientific knowledge become a special advantage. From marine drones, NRC and drones to complex artificial intelligence systems - your developments...
description_uk: Українські інженери, винахідники, дослідники та науковці сьогодні є рушієм нашої технологічної сили. Саме завдяки вашому розуму та щоденній праці Україна знаходить ефективні відповіді на найскладніші виклики. У час війни технологічний розвиток, креативність та наукове знання стають особливою перевагою. Від морських дронів, НРК та безпілотників до складних систем штучного інтелекту – ваші розробки...

title: 🕯 The bodies of 528 victims were returned to Ukraine 🚪 Today, as a...

description: 🕯 The bodies of 528 victims were returned to Ukraine 🚪 Today, as a result of repatriation measures, another 528 bodies (remains) were returned to Ukraine, which, according to the Moscow side, belong to Ukrainian military personnel. 📷 It was possible to return the bodies as a result of the joint work of employees of the Coordination Headquarters for the Treatment of Prisoners of War, the Joint Center under the Security Service of Ukraine, the Armed Forces...
description_en: 🕯 The bodies of 528 victims were returned to Ukraine 🚪 Today, as a result of repatriation measures, another 528 bodies (remains) were returned to Ukraine, which, according to the Moscow side, belong to Ukrainian military personnel. 📷 It was possible to return the bodies as a result of the joint work of employees of the Coordination Headquarters for the Treatment of Prisoners of War, the Joint Center under the Security Service of Ukraine, the Armed Forces...
description_uk: 🕯 В Україну повернули тіла 528 загиблих 🚪 Сьогодні в результаті репатріаційних заходів в Україну повернуто ще 528 тіл (останків), які за твердженням московитської сторони належать українським військовослужбовцям. 📷 Тіла вдалося повернути за результатами спільної роботи співробітників Координаційного штабу з питань поводження з військовополоненими, Об’єднаного центру при СБ України, Збройних Сил...

title: Drone strike
title_en: Drone strike
description: Our long-range sanctions for this week. And most of the operations are still in progress, so not all of our results are on the video. There is damage to the Be-200 amphibious aircraft, the Ka-27 rotorcraft, a dry cargo ship with ammunition, the Pantsir-S1 anti-aircraft missile and gun complex, the Tor anti-aircraft missile complex, the Redut-2US communication complex, drones and much more. Also, our long-range sanctions hit...
description_en: Our long-range sanctions for this week. And most of the operations are still in progress, so not all of our results are on the video. There is damage to the Be-200 amphibious aircraft, the Ka-27 rotorcraft, a dry cargo ship with ammunition, the Pantsir-S1 anti-aircraft missile and gun complex, the Tor anti-aircraft missile complex, the Redut-2US communication complex, drones and much more. Also, our long-range sanctions hit...
description_uk: Наші далекобійні санкції за цей тиждень. І більша частина операцій ще триває, тому на відео далеко не всі наші результати. Є ураження літака-амфібії Бе-200, гвинтокрила Ка-27, корабля-суховантажу з боєприпасами, зенітного ракетно-гарматного комплексу «Панцир-С1», зенітного ракетного комплексу «Тор», комплексу звʼязку «Редут-2УС», дронів і багато іншого. Також наші далекобійні санкції били по...

title: Ukraine holds on thanks to those who, with their courage, dedication...
title_en: Ukraine holds on thanks to those who, with their courage, dedication...
title_uk: Україна тримається завдяки тим, хто своєю мужністю, самовідданістю...
description: Ukraine holds on thanks to those who, with their courage, dedication and strength, provide us with the opportunity to be - to be ourselves, to be Ukraine. For the fifth year, we are facing an enemy who is bigger than us, but who is not getting what he wants. And thanks to our people, thanks to our Ukrainian determination to defend ourselves, we will definitely stop Russia and guarantee the safety of our state and people. Noted...
description_en: Ukraine holds on thanks to those who, with their courage, dedication and strength, provide us with the opportunity to be - to be ourselves, to be Ukraine. For the fifth year, we are facing an enemy who is bigger than us, but who is not getting what he wants. And thanks to our people, thanks to our Ukrainian determination to defend ourselves, we will definitely stop Russia and guarantee the safety of our state and people. Noted...
description_uk: Україна тримається завдяки тим, хто своєю сміливістю, відданістю та силою забезпечують нам можливість бути – бути собою, бути Україною. П’ятий рік ми стоїмо проти ворога, який більше, ніж ми, але який не досягає того, чого хоче. І завдяки нашим людям, завдяки нашій українській налаштованості захиститись ми обовʼязково зупинимо Росію та гарантуємо безпеку для нашої держави й людей. Відзначив...

title: Kharkiv: Attack attack on infrastructure
title_en: Kharkiv: Attack attack on infrastructure
description: Russian attack damages infrastructure in Odesa Oblast and Kharkiv. Russian forces launched overnight strikes targeting critical and civilian infrastructure across parts of Ukraine on the night of May 15–16, with attacks reported in Odesa Oblast and Kharkiv, according to regional authorities.
description_en: Russian attack damages infrastructure in Odesa Oblast and Kharkiv. Russian forces launched overnight strikes targeting critical and civilian infrastructure across parts of Ukraine on the night of May 15–16, with attacks reported in Odesa Oblast and Kharkiv, according to regional authorities.

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
description: There are reasonable suspicions that some "Shahedas" have EW devices installed to suppress our drone interceptors, as well as EW devices to interfere with radar stations. This was stated by the adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergey "Flash" Beskrestnov. "There is nothing unexpected in this for us, but it is important to keep the whole situation under control even before the facts are confirmed," he wrote...
description_en: There are reasonable suspicions that some "Shahedas" have EW devices installed to suppress our drone interceptors, as well as EW devices to interfere with radar stations. This was stated by the adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergey "Flash" Beskrestnov. "There is nothing unexpected in this for us, but it is important to keep the whole situation under control even before the facts are confirmed," he wrote...
description_uk: Есть обоснованные подозрения, что на некоторых "Шахедах" установлены средства РЭБ для подавления наших перехватчиков-дронов, а также средства РЭБ для создания помех радиолокационным станциям. Об этом заявил советник министра обороны Сергей "Флэш" Бескрестнов. "Для нас в этом нет ничего неожиданного, но важно держать всю ситуацию под контролем еще до того, как факты будут подтверждены", - написал...

title: Statements by the president and other officials about the shortage of...
title_en: Statements by the president and other officials about the shortage of...
title_uk: Заяви президента та інших чиновників про дефіцит...
description: Statements by the president and other officials about the shortage of missiles for air defense were a provocation of the Russian Federation so that the aggressor squandered its reserves, as well as a call to Ukraine's partners to speed up deliveries. This opinion was expressed by the commander of the special forces group of the Armed Forces of Ukraine Konstantin Proshinsky: "In reality, there was no shortage. These words were simply said in order to force the Russian side...
description_en: Statements by the president and other officials about the shortage of missiles for air defense were a provocation of the Russian Federation so that the aggressor squandered its reserves, as well as a call to Ukraine's partners to speed up deliveries. This opinion was expressed by the commander of the special forces group of the Armed Forces of Ukraine Konstantin Proshinsky: "In reality, there was no shortage. These words were simply said in order to force the Russian side...
description_uk: Заявления президента и других официальных лиц о дефиците ракет для ПВО были провоцированием рф на то, чтобы агрессор растратил свои запасы, а также призывом к партнерам Украины ускорить поставки Такое мнение высказал командир группы спецподразделения ЗСУ Константин Прошинский: "На самом деле никакого дефицита не было. Эти слова просто говорились для того, чтобы вынудить российскую сторону...

description: 🤝 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andrii Sybiga held a meeting with PACE President Petra Bair on the sidelines of the 135th session of the Committee of Ministers in Chisinau. 💬 "Grateful to PACE for unwavering support of Ukraine, in particular for actively promoting the creation of the Special Tribunal for the Crime of Aggression against Ukraine and the international compensation mechanism. They discussed further parliamentary efforts to ensure...
description_en: 🤝 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andrii Sybiga held a meeting with PACE President Petra Bair on the sidelines of the 135th session of the Committee of Ministers in Chisinau. 💬 "Grateful to PACE for unwavering support of Ukraine, in particular for actively promoting the creation of the Special Tribunal for the Crime of Aggression against Ukraine and the international compensation mechanism. They discussed further parliamentary efforts to ensure...
description_uk: 🤝 Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга провів зустріч з Президенткою ПАРЄ Петрою Байр на полях 135-ї сесії Комітету міністрів у Кишиневі. 💬 "Вдячний ПАРЄ за непохитну підтримку України, зокрема за активне просування створення Спеціального трибуналу щодо злочину агресії проти України та міжнародного компенсаційного механізму. Обговорили подальші парламентські зусилля для забезпечення...
